channel.title: Container Security on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Container Security on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Microsoft Defender for Cloud support for Azure Container Apps (Serverless Containers Posture)
item.description:
Microsoft Defender for Cloud now supports Azure Container Apps environments in its Serverless Containers Posture experience, available in public preview. This lets security teams manage posture for more of their container estate from one workflow.

  • Source: Azure Updates
